name: rs-auth
description: RS auth and admin tools via the deployed auth MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Manage RS users, roles, bans, and sessions
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to the RS auth worker MCP server for authenticated session inspection and user administration through the existing Better Auth and OAuth-backed MCP flow.
defaultPrompt: List RS users and inspect auth state
Create, ban, or change a user role in RS auth
Check my current RS auth session
